assertion_results.text: The remediation output describes the digest protocol for the upstream backport task: re-fetching the task description from Jira after create_issue and computing a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 77-129 describe 'Description Digest Protocol (Upstream Task)' with Step 1 re-fetching via jira.get_issue(<upstream-task-key>, fields=["description"]) (line 84) and Step 2 computing SHA-256 via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md' (line 96).

assertion_results.text: The remediation output describes the digest protocol for the downstream propagation subtask: re-fetching the task description from Jira after create_issue and computing a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 189-240 describe 'Description Digest Protocol (Downstream Task)' with Step 1 re-fetching via jira.get_issue(<downstream-task-key>, fields=["description"]) (line 195) and Step 2 computing SHA-256 via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md' (line 207).

assertion_results.text: The remediation output includes the digest comment marker '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' in the described steps for each remediation task — both upstream and downstream (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: Upstream: line 105 shows jira.add_comment with '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: <tagged-digest>'. Downstream: line 217 shows the same marker. Both include the exact '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' prefix.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output sequences digest comments BEFORE issue links (Depend, Blocks) or other comments in the described procedure for each task (§1.66, shared/description-digest-protocol.md Rules)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 129 states 'This digest comment is posted BEFORE creating issue links (Depend link to TC-8001, Blocks link to downstream task) or any other comments on the task.' Line 240 states the same for downstream. The 'Jira Linkage' section (line 244) is titled 'after both digest comments are posted'. Complete sequences (lines 275-288) show digest at step 4, links deferred to step 5.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output specifies that the digest is computed from the re-fetched description (via Jira API after create_issue), not from the description string passed to create_issue (shared/description-digest-protocol.md Hashing)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 87-88: 'The re-fetched content is used for hashing -- NOT the input string passed to create_issue -- because Jira normalizes content during storage (whitespace, ADF conversion, etc.).' Lines 198-199 repeat for downstream. Line 293 in Key Rules: 'Re-fetch, do not reuse: The digest is computed from the description as re-fetched from Jira after create_issue, NOT from the input string.'
